kinds.description: C or C-compatible header surface exposed across component boundaries.
kinds.proof_expectations: include sanity, ABI boundary, and public-header consumer proof before stable promotion
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable headers require compatibility tests and replacement notes

kinds.description: Machine-readable ABI or symbol table contract.
kinds.compatibility_expectation: frozen ABI requires explicit replacement packet

kinds.description: Schema or schema family defining structured data shape.
kinds.proof_expectations: schema parse and compatibility fixture before stable promotion
kinds.compatibility_expectation: schema evolution policy required for stable data contracts

kinds.description: Machine-readable registry, manifest, or policy table.
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable registries require migration and replacement policy

kinds.description: Protocol contract, message shape, or handshake rule.
kinds.proof_expectations: protocol conformance tests before stable promotion
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable protocols require compatibility corpus

kinds.description: CLI, tool, product, or machine command surface.
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable commands require output/refusal compatibility

kinds.description: View, UI projection, or presentation contract.
kinds.proof_expectations: UI shell purity and projection tests
kinds.compatibility_expectation: views are not authority unless promoted by contract

kinds.description: Event identifier, event payload, or event log surface.
kinds.proof_expectations: replay/event compatibility tests before stable promotion
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable event surfaces require replay compatibility

kinds.description: Refusal code or refusal taxonomy surface.
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable refusal IDs require compatibility policy

kinds.description: Diagnostic, warning, or error code surface.
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable codes require deprecation policy

kinds.description: Pack, package, bundle, lock, or package manifest format.
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable formats require migration/refusal policy

kinds.description: Profile or parameter bundle format.
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable profiles require version policy

kinds.description: Save file or persisted state format.
kinds.proof_expectations: save migration tests before stable promotion
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable saves require migration/refusal policy

kinds.description: Replay log or replay proof format.
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable replay requires replay corpus

kinds.description: Provider, plugin, or external capability ABI.
kinds.proof_expectations: provider conformance tests before stable promotion
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable provider ABI requires replacement protocol

kinds.description: Capability identifier or capability registry surface.
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable capability IDs require deprecation policy

kinds.description: Build, audit, evidence, or emitted artifact format.
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable artifacts require identity law

kinds.description: Release, update, installer, or promotion surface.
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable release artifacts require release policy

kinds.description: Application descriptor or product entrypoint declaration.
kinds.proof_expectations: product boot and command proof before stable promotion
kinds.compatibility_expectation: stable descriptors require version policy

kinds.description: Workbench or module descriptor surface.
kinds.compatibility_expectation: not stable until module composition law exists

kinds.description: Workbench workspace, project, or persisted editor surface.
kinds.proof_expectations: workspace schema and migration tests before stable promotion
kinds.compatibility_expectation: not stable in this task

kinds.description: Test-only fixture or validation sample.
kinds.proof_expectations: fixture must be consumed by tests or validator fixture mode
kinds.compatibility_expectation: not a product compatibility promise

kinds.description: Generated output or projection with a source of truth elsewhere.
kinds.proof_expectations: source and generator must be declared when active
kinds.compatibility_expectation: generated output is not source truth

kinds.description: Historical, retired, or archived evidence record.
kinds.compatibility_expectation: not an active public surface unless separately promoted

kinds.description: Human-readable documentation surface.
kinds.compatibility_expectation: documentation is binding only when authority scope says so
